entry.data:
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE UPPER 40S THIS AFTERNOON
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST THIS AFTERNOON
GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S
NORTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH

SUNNY, COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE MID 50S

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
BREEZY WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF RAIN AND SNOW SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
BREEZY AND MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE UPPER 20S
CHANCE OF PRECIPITATION 40 PERCENT

SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS AROUND 40

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 20S

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 40S
